tool.name: MaiqMag Resolution Training

secret.name: mlflow_api_key
secret.label: MLFlow API Key
secret.description: Your MLFlow API key. Get it from https://profile.american-science-cloud.org

tool.command: mkdir sim_data && tar -xf $sim_results -C sim_data/ && export TORCHINDUCTOR_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/torchinductor && #if not $varExists('__job_resource.__job_resource__select') or $__job_resource.__job_resource__select=='no' or not $varExists('__job_resource.remote_resource') or $__job_resource.remote_resource !='marble' : #set $pixi_bin="pixi" #set $pixi_manifest_path="/app" #else #set $pixi_bin="/lustre/orion/mat745/proj-shared/maiqmag/pixi/bin/pixi" #set $pixi_manifest_path="/lustre/orion/mat745/proj-shared/maiqmag/maiqmag_train" #end if $pixi_bin run --as-is --manifest-path $pixi_manifest_path python -m maiqmag_ml train --root-dir sim_data --output $model #if str($mlflow.enabled) == 'true': --mlflow --mlflow-tracking-uri '$mlflow.tracking_uri' --mlflow-experiment '$mlflow.experiment' --mlflow-run-name '$mlflow.run_name' #if $mlflow.upload_model: --mlflow-upload-model #end if #end if > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2)
tool.help:
**MaiqMag Resolution Training**
This is a Galaxy tool to train the resolution model using Sunny/McVine digital twin simulations. It can ron on a VM with GPU or on Frontier.
